tasks.description: Expose diff_workdir() through Tauri IPC. Add get_diff_workdir command following existing spawn_blocking + open-per-call pattern.
steps: cargo check passes in src-tauri/
cargo test diff_workdir --lib passes
Invoking get_diff_workdir with a valid repo path returns DiffFileEntry[] with real file data
Invoking get_diff_workdir with an invalid path returns structured error string, not panic

tasks.description: Preserve and validate watcher lifecycle correctness under repo switches and event bursts. Keep filter rules, debounce behavior, and replacement semantics stable.
steps: cargo test watcher --lib passes (all 8+ existing tests)
Starting watcher on valid path succeeds
Starting new watcher replaces previous watcher (old is dropped)
Stopping watcher halts new events
Filtered paths (.git/objects, .git/logs, target/, node_modules/) still suppressed
Important .git paths (.git/index, .git/HEAD, .git/refs/*) still emit events

tasks.description: Load real diff entries from backend, render changed-file list in /spike-d, and show selected file diff in DiffViewer with repo-backed content instead of sample data.
steps: pnpm check passes with 0 errors
Changed-file list loads from real repo data via get_diff_workdir
Selecting a file updates the DiffViewer with that file's original/modified content
Empty state shown when no changed files exist
Loading and error states are visible during fetch
DiffViewer renders repo-backed diff in CodeMirror MergeView
Large unchanged regions remain collapsible

tasks.description: Connect repo-changed watcher events to scoped diff/status reload. External edits refresh visible diff surface without full-app reload, within ~500ms end-to-end.
steps: External file edit triggers repo-changed event
repo-changed causes diff/status refresh for the active spike-d surface only
App does not use full-page invalidation as the default response
End-to-end file-change to UI-refresh stays within ~500ms
Debounced edits do not spam redundant refreshes
pnpm check passes with 0 errors
cargo check passes in src-tauri/

patterns: Svelte 5 runes stores: $state(), $derived, $effect() — see theme.svelte.ts, watcher.svelte.ts
Watcher event bridge: listen<void>('repo-changed') in WatcherMonitor.svelte:18-22
Design tokens: src/app.css has diff/merge color tokens
nonGoals: Rich per-file event payload beyond coarse repo-changed
